forest.name: Forest
forest.description: Combat tile. 50% chance to spawn a forest enemy.

graveyard.name: Graveyard
graveyard.description: Combat tile. 50% chance to spawn a graveyard enemy.

swamp.name: Swamp
swamp.description: Combat tile. 50% chance to spawn a swamp enemy.

desert.name: Desert
desert.description: Combat tile. 50% chance to spawn a desert enemy.

lava.name: Lava Fields
lava.description: Combat tile. 50% chance to spawn a lava enemy.

event.name: Event
event.description: Random event: heal, gold, trap, slow, or surprise combat.

subtile_ambush.name: Ambush
subtile_ambush.description: Combats in range start with Slow(2) + Bleed(3) on the enemy.

subtile_magma.name: Magma Burst
subtile_magma.description: Combats in range start with Burn(5) on the enemy.

subtile_manawell.name: Mana Well
subtile_manawell.description: Combats in range start with +2 Mana for the hero.

subtile_camp.name: Tactical Camp
subtile_camp.description: Combats in range start with +5 Armor for the hero.

subtile_burnaltar.name: Burn Altar
subtile_burnaltar.description: Every Burn applied this fight gets +1 stack.

subtile_bleedtotem.name: Bleed Totem
subtile_bleedtotem.description: Bleed ticks deal +1 damage per stack this fight.

subtile_resonance.name: Resonance Crystal
subtile_resonance.description: Magic cards deal +15% damage this fight.

subtile_warhorn.name: War Horn
subtile_warhorn.description: Combat tiles in range are guaranteed to spawn an enemy.
